__comment__: Hook wiring for .claude/settings.json. MERGE the `hooks` block below into your existing settings.json (don't overwrite the whole file). Adjust the paths to where you copied this `hooks/` directory. See README.md.
__how_to_wire__: 1. Copy the whole hooks/ directory into your .claude/ (e.g. .claude/hooks/reflection/).
2. Merge the `hooks` block below into .claude/settings.json, fixing the `command` paths.

3. The Stop hook drives the ON_TURN_END reflection facets (failure->control). The PreToolUse hook logs Skill invocations to the measured leash (are your skills firing?). The PostToolUse hook is OPTIONAL and only needed for the ON_MEMORY_WRITE facets (memory-routing, bank-consistency); wire it plus a sibling memory-write emitter, and set REFLECTION_MEMORY_DIRS / REFLECTION_BANK_PAIR.

4. Kill switches (set in `env` below or your shell): REFLECTION_TURN_END_OFF=1 disables the reflection family; SELFOPS_SKILL_TELEMETRY_OFF=1 disables skill-usage logging; each facet has its own, e.g. REFLECTION_FAILURE_CONTROL_OFF=1, REFLECTION_BANK_CONSISTENCY_OFF=1.
